changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: UPDATE actions_config SET is_active = false WHERE code = 'CSAM1';

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO actions_config (code, version, config, is_active, last_updated_at, major_version, minor_version, patch_version) VALUES ('CSAM1', 1, '{ "rules": [], "payment": { "ratePerUnitGbp": 6, "ratePerAgreementPerYearGbp": 97 }, "start_date": "2025-01-01", "duration_years": 3, "land_cover_class_codes": [ "110", "111", "112", "117", "118", "121", "130", "131", "140", "141", "142", "143" ], "application_unit_of_measurement": "ha" }', TRUE, now(), 1, 0, 1);
